summary: Iteration 4 (ErrorBoundary + Console web app + live leaderboard) full backend + frontend testing. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases green (health, stats, signup shape, idempotent, referral, lookup, beta unlock + cap saturation, admin auth). Additional ad-hoc leaderboard correctness verified via DB inspection: users with referral_count>0 appear on /api/waitlist/leaderboard, users with 0 referrals are excluded (HAVING count > 0). Frontend: landing waitlist submit works cold + idempotent WITHOUT blank-screen crash (ErrorBoundary in App.js wraps everything, no error-boundary fallback visible on happy path); nav-launch-app + hero-launch-app both link to /console; global window event 'phasor:waitlist-updated' fires on submit and Leaderboard listens to it. Console: /console loads Dashboard, all 6 sidebar nav testids present, Meetings connect form rejects invalid URLs (stays on /meetings) and accepts Google Meet URL (navigates to /console/meetings/live-xxxx), Live meeting renders Michael R. flagged tile + progressive transcript (5 lines) + alert modal ('Deepfake voice detected') on 4th line, hangup returns to /meetings. Integrations shows all 7 cards (google-meet/zoom/gcal/chrome/phone/email/slack), connect toggles to 'live' with disconnect flipping back. Threat log shows 8 rows and Phone filter narrows to 2. Fingerprints enrollment adds new voice tile after ~1.5s. Settings sensitivity range + toggles interact without crashes. Wildcard bad URL redirects to /.

issues: `leaderboard-updated` timestamp is minute-precision (HH:MM) — visually static within the same minute even though refetches occur every 6s and after phasor:waitlist-updated event. Consider seconds precision or a subtle 'refreshing…' pulse so users perceive liveness. Not a functional bug.

passed: Backend 13/13 pytest cases (health, stats, signup shape, idempotent, invalid email 422, invalid ref ignored, referral increment + position bump, lookup + case-insensitive + 404, beta unlock at 3 refs + slots decrement, beta cap saturation prevents grant, admin auth + shape).
Ad-hoc leaderboard scenario: A signs up, 3 friends signup with ?ref=A -> A appears at rank 1 with referrals=3 beta_access=true; friends with 0 referrals are NOT on the board (HAVING count>0 correct).
Landing / loads, waitlist-form + waitlist-email + waitlist-submit render; POST /api/waitlist -> share-panel with #position and share-url containing ?ref=<code>.
ErrorBoundary wraps app (no fallback shown on happy path; no blank screen on submit).
Idempotent re-submit shows 'Welcome back' variant of SharePanel.
Custom 'phasor:waitlist-updated' event fires once per successful Hero submit (verified via window listener count).
Leaderboard.js window event listener registered (source code + refetch mechanism verified; 6s polling additionally present).
/console renders ConsoleShell with 6 sidebar navs (console-nav-dashboard/meetings/threat-log/voice-dna/integrations/settings) + default Dashboard.
/console/meetings: invalid URL -> stays on /meetings (toast error). Valid Google Meet URL -> navigates to /console/meetings/live-xxxx.

/console/meetings/live-xxxx: console-live-meeting rendered; Michael R. tile present; live-transcript reaches 5 lines; live-alert-modal appears on the 4th (flag) line containing 'Deepfake voice detected'; live-hangup returns to /console/meetings.
/console/integrations: 7 cards (integration-google-meet/zoom/gcal/chrome/phone/email/slack); integration-connect-google-meet flips to 'live' state with disconnect button, disconnect reverts.
/console/fingerprints: enrollment flow adds new voice tile 'voice-testvoicex' after ~1.4s wait; count 4 -> 5.
/console/settings: sensitivity-range interactive; toggles present; no crashes.
action_items: OPTIONAL / cosmetic: bump leaderboard-updated timestamp to seconds precision (or add a brief 'refreshing…' pulse) so the live-update effect is visually perceptible when a submit lands within the same minute.

OPTIONAL / cosmetic: SharePanel leaderboard-pill match uses maskEmail-string equality — since many emails collide to the same masked handle (e.g. all 'te...@e...com' testers), the pill won't reliably light up in real user scenarios either (any two users sharing first-2 local chars + first domain char + tld will falsely match/mismatch). Consider matching by referral_code passed from backend (extend leaderboard entries to include a hashed_code or opaque id), otherwise the pill can point to the wrong row.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py::list_waitlist (admin) still runs _compute_position in a loop -> O(N^2) count queries. For 1000+ rows this will time out. Batch it with a single windowed query (ROW_NUMBER over created_at) then adjust by referral_count in Python. Same critique carries over from iteration 3.

SharePanel.jsx leaderboard-pill matching by maskEmail + referrals is fragile — many emails hash to the same mask. Should match by referral_code (add code to LeaderboardEntry response, or use a separate lookup endpoint).

Meetings.js detectPlatform is case-insensitive substring — 'https://foo.zoom.us.evil.com' would falsely pass as Zoom. For a demo this is fine; before production, parse URL and check hostname suffix exact match.
LiveMeeting.js hard-codes the alert modal at i===3. If TRANSCRIPT_LINES grows/shrinks the trigger drifts. Better: fire alert on the 2nd 'flag' tone occurrence.
Integrations.js: `Waves` and `Fingerprint` imports in Fingerprints.js unused (also `Waves` in LiveMeeting.js sidebar imports). Lint-clean but tree-shakes fine.

Frontend Leaderboard.js: shadowing global `window` with local `useState('window', ...)` variable is legal but confusing; renaming to `windowKey`/`period` would prevent accidental future bugs (`window` inside the effect refers to the local state, not the DOM window).
test_credentials: ADMIN_TOKEN=phasor-admin-dev; Supabase pooler URI already in /app/backend/.env DATABASE_URL
seed_data_creation: Ad-hoc test rows (test_iter4_*, iter4_ui_*, iter4_live_*) created during testing were deleted afterwards. Also cleaned leftover test_iter3_* rows from previous iterations. Waitlist table final state: 3 non-test rows preserved (real prior signups such as rash24july@gmail.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 fully passing. Console app is fully mocked/simulated (Meeting connect is a 900ms setTimeout, LiveMeeting uses hard-coded PARTICIPANTS + TRANSCRIPT_LINES arrays, Integrations connect is client-only state, ThreatLog + Fingerprints + Settings use in-memory seed data). No backend endpoints power /console — only /api/waitlist* endpoints exist on backend. Backend tests remain in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py; run via `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/iteration_N.xml`. Table has 3 legacy real rows kept intentionally.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs found. The user-reported iteration-3 blank-screen crash on waitlist submit is confirmed FIXED via (1) ErrorBoundary wrapping <BrowserRouter> in App.js, and (2) SharePanel.copy() now handling clipboard promise rejection with try/catch + hidden-textarea fallback (Hero.js lines 68-100). Reproduction with valid email now renders SharePanel cleanly without dev-overlay red screen.
